enonce.texte: Match each question word with its correct use.

questions.reponse: To ask about things or objects.

sousQuestions.reponse: We use 'What' to ask about things or objects.
We use 'When' to ask about time.
We use 'Why' to ask about reasons.

intitule: Asking Questions About Time and Seasons

enonce.texte: Complete the questions with the correct interrogative word: What, When, Why, How, Which.

questions.texte: ______ do you wake up in the morning?
______ is the weather like in summer?
______ season do you prefer, spring or autumn?

intitule: Reading and Understanding a Text About Seasons

enonce.texte:
Read the text below and answer the questions.

My Favourite Season

My name is Amina. I live in Cameroon. We have two main seasons: the rainy season and the dry season. The rainy season starts in March and ends in October. It rains a lot during this time. The weather is cool and fresh. The dry season starts in November and ends in February. The weather is hot and sunny. I like the rainy season because the air is fresh and the trees are green. My brother prefers the dry season because he can play football outside.

questions.texte: What are the two main seasons in Cameroon according to the text?
questions.reponse: The two main seasons are the rainy season and the dry season.

questions.texte: When does the rainy season start and end?
questions.reponse: The rainy season starts in March and ends in October.

questions.texte: Why does Amina like the rainy season?
questions.reponse: She likes the rainy season because the air is fresh and the trees are green.

questions.texte: What does Amina's brother prefer and why?
questions.reponse: Her brother prefers the dry season because he can play football outside.

intitule: Asking and Answering Questions About Seasons

enonce.texte:
Write a short dialogue between two students (A and B) asking and answering questions about seasons, weather, and activities.

Example questions to use:

  • What is your favourite season?
  • When does the rainy season start?
  • Why do you like this season?
  • What do you do during the dry season?

questions.texte: Write a dialogue of about 6 to 8 exchanges.
questions.reponse: Example: A: Hello, B. What is your favourite season? B: Hi, A. I like the rainy season. A: Why do you like it? B: Because the weather is cool and I like the rain. A: When does the rainy season start? B: It starts in March. A: What do you do during the rainy season? B: I like to read books and stay at home. A: That sounds nice. I prefer the dry season because I can play football. B: That's a good reason too!

sousQuestions.texte: Write a dialogue with at least 6 exchanges.
Use at least 3 different interrogative words.

intitule: Creating Questions About Seasons and Activities

enonce.texte: Write questions for the following answers using the correct interrogative words.

questions.texte: Answer: I wake up at 6 o'clock in the morning.
questions.reponse: What time do you wake up? / When do you wake up?

sousQuestions.reponse: What time do you wake up?

questions.texte: Answer: The weather is hot and sunny in the dry season.
questions.reponse: What is the weather like in the dry season?

sousQuestions.reponse: What is the weather like in the dry season?

questions.texte: Answer: I like summer because I can swim.
Answer: The rainy season starts in March.
questions.reponse: When does the rainy season start?

sousQuestions.reponse: When does the rainy season start?

enonce.texte: Write a short paragraph (5–7 sentences) describing your favourite season. Include: the name of the season, the weather, what you like to do during that season, and why you like it.

questions.texte: Write a paragraph about your favourite season.
questions.reponse: Example: My favourite season is the rainy season. It usually starts in March and ends in October. The weather is cool and fresh during this time. I like to stay at home and read books. I also enjoy listening to the sound of rain. I like the rainy season because the air is clean and the trees are green.

sousQuestions.texte: Include information about weather, activities, and reasons.
sousQuestions.reponse: The rainy season, cool and fresh weather, reading books, listening to rain, clean air, green trees.

intitule: Drawing and Describing a Seasonal Scene

enonce.texte: Draw a picture of your favourite season. Then write 5 sentences describing your drawing.
images: A drawing of a seasonal scene showing weather, people, and activities typical of a season.

questions.reponse: Example: This is my drawing of the rainy season. The sky is grey and it is raining. There are big green trees in the picture. A girl is reading a book inside the house. Outside, there are puddles of water. I like this scene because it is calm and peaceful.

sousQuestions.texte: Describe the weather, activities, and why you like the scene.
sousQuestions.reponse: Grey sky, raining, green trees, girl reading, puddles, calm and peaceful.
